name: nexus-dotnet
description: Nexus .NET (thin) — a stack extension for the `nexus` core pipeline. Ships the 32 .NET / ASP.NET Core / EF Core / CQRS / DDD / FastEndpoints + Vue / Pinia / Tailwind code-pattern skills plus the stack convention files (Read-Index model). Reuses nexus's agents, rules, commands, and security guard — install ALONGSIDE nexus, not instead of it.
